task_completion.description: Verify that the weight entries for 2026-01-12 and 2026-03-16 have been corrected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the weight log or chart in the wger UI. Verify that the entry for 2026-01-12 is 87.3 kg and the entry for 2026-03-16 is 84.6 kg. The previous outlier of 186.4 kg should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that new body composition measurements have been added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the measurements section in the wger UI. Verify the presence of new entries: Body Fat Percentage at 16.8%, Chest Circumference at 102.8 cm, and Waist Circumference at 82.3 cm.

task_completion.description: Verify the routine is renamed and the 'Full Body' day is deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the routine overview in the wger UI. Verify the routine name is 'Strength-Power Phase B' and that the 'Full Body' day is no longer present.

task_completion.description: Verify that existing days have updated exercises.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the exercises within the 'Strength-Power Phase B' routine. Verify that 'Upper Push' includes 'Incline Dumbbell Press' and does not include 'Overhead Press'. Verify that 'Lower Body' includes 'Romanian Deadlift'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new 'Explosive Power' day is added with correct exercises.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the routine days in the wger UI. Verify there is a day named 'Explosive Power' that includes the exercises 'Pull-ups', 'Power Clean', and 'Kettlebell Swing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Maintenance Phase' nutrition plan has updated macros and meals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Maintenance Phase' nutrition plan in the wger UI. Verify the goals are set to 3033 kcal, 186g protein, 381g carbs, 85g fat. Verify that the 'Dinner' meal is absent and a 'Post-Workout Recovery' meal is present containing Whey Protein Powder and Banana.

task_completion.description: Verify the new 'Competition Peak Nutrition' plan is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the nutrition plans list or detail view in the wger UI. Verify the existence of a plan named 'Competition Peak Nutrition' with goals: 2400 kcal, 200g protein, 220g carbs, 70g fat, and containing the meals 'Pre-Weigh-In Breakfast', 'Post-Weigh-In Recovery', and 'Pre-Competition Fuel'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the wger web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the wger web interface (e.g., clicking edit buttons, filling out forms) rather than executing SQL commands or using API scripts in the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the quarterly audit report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening `~/Documents/quarterly_audit_report.txt` in a text editor or terminal (e.g., using cat, less, or a GUI editor) to read the instructions.

integrity.description: Verify the results are displayed within the actual wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the wger application interface with the updated data, not just a text file or a mocked-up page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Weight corrections: 2026-01-12 changed to 87.3 kg, 2026-03-16 changed to 84.6 kg. New measurements: Body Fat 16.8%, Chest 102.8 cm, Waist 82.3 cm. Routine renamed to 'Strength-Power Phase B'. 'Full Body' day deleted. 'Upper Push' day: Incline Dumbbell Press added, Overhead Press removed. 'Lower Body' day: Romanian Deadlift added. New day 'Explosive Power' added with Pull-ups, Power Clean, Kettlebell Swing. 'Maintenance Phase' nutrition plan updated to 3033 kcal, 186g protein, 381g carbs, 85g fat; 'Dinner' removed; 'Post-Workout Recovery' added (Whey Protein Powder, Banana). New plan 'Competition Peak Nutrition' created with 2400 kcal, 200g protein, 220g carbs, 70g fat and 3 meals: 'Pre-Weigh-In Breakfast', 'Post-Weigh-In Recovery', 'Pre-Competition Fuel'.
